---
title: "Ella Patten's Resume"
---

# Ella Patten

720-485-7499 | [ellapatten05@gmail.com](mailto:ellapatten05@gmail.com) | [linkedin.com/in/ellapatten](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ellapatten) | Littleton, CO

## Education

**Brigham Young University – Idaho** | Rexburg, ID | Expected Graduation: 2027\
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science

## Experience

**Volunteer Missionary** | The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints | Curitiba, Brazil\
*Sep 2024 – Mar 2026*

- Taught and communicated daily in Brazilian Portuguese across culturally diverse communities
- Led and co-led trainings for groups of 50+ volunteers in a high-accountability environment
- Built and optimized a regional data management and referral tracking system using Google Apps Script
- Developed cross-cultural communication, adaptability, and team leadership over 18 months

**Software Engineer Intern** | USAA | San Antonio, TX\
*May 2024 – Aug 2024*

- Reduced memory and CPU utilization by ~10% by identifying and retiring obsolete APIs
- Simplified architecture by implementing 20 circuit breakers, improving system resilience
- Streamlined call center workflow by eliminating redundant processes, improving team efficiency
- Worked within an Agile/Scrum environment, participating in daily standups and sprint planning

**Receptionist** | Brigham Young University – Idaho | Rexburg, ID\
*Sep 2023 – May 2024*

- Managed inbound call volume and routed work orders to academic advisors
- Assisted students with academic and administrative inquiries

**Administrative Assistant** | Davis Consulting Inc. | Littleton, CO\
*Sep 2022 – May 2024*

- Organized and secured confidential client tax files for a professional tax consulting firm

## Technical Skills

**Languages & Frameworks:** Python, JavaScript, HTML, SQL, Google Apps Script\
**Tools & Platforms:** Git, GitHub, Agile/Scrum\
**Certifications:** PCAP (Associate in Python), PCEP (Entry-Level Python), TestOut Network Pro, TestOut PC Pro\
**Soft Skills:** Cross-Cultural Communication, Team Leadership, Public Speaking, Adaptability, Problem Solving

## Languages

**English** (Native) **Brazilian Portuguese** (Fluent — 18 months immersive experience in Curitiba, Brazil)

## Awards

**Outstanding Young Woman in STEM** – IX Power Foundation | Feb 2022\
*Recognized for exceptional achievement and leadership in the STEM field.*
